title: The Wizard — (Eddy's father Kol?) — Pool-arc antagonist
bodyText:
The mortal mastermind running the **cult** around [[the-pool|the Pool]]. Ancient — kept alive far past a mortal span by the Pool itself. **Present at the Pool: he is this arc's antagonist** (party + any summoned allies vs. his operation, with [[lolth]]'s drow crashing in as a third force).

# Likely identity (strong lean, grill 2026-07-09)
**Good chance he is Kol — [[pc-eddy|Eddy]]'s father from [[shipton]]**, from long, long ago (which is *why* he's ancient; the Pool sustains him). If so he fathered **Edrelon** — the very Shipton mind now riding in Eddy ([[pc-eddy]]). The confrontation is Eddy meeting the father of the man he half-is.

# Motive — the doctrine, and the truth underneath
He caught the calling of **[[torm|Torm]]** (duty, loyalty, **self-sacrifice**) and, after the Pool revealed how it works, **twisted it into a doctrine that all life should sacrifice itself into the Pool as part of Torm's plan.** That's the public shape.

**The lock (grill 2026-07-09, session 2): he KNOWS — and serves anyway.** He *started* as the false Torm's sincere dupe, but centuries of experiments showed him the truth: the Pool isn't Torm's. He performs the doctrine regardless — it keeps him alive, and it keeps **something he loves preserved inside** (Trista? see below). The faith is a costume now; the false god ([[torm]]) may still whisper, and he knowingly plays along. Far colder than a zealot: a man who saw the lie and chose it.

His on-the-ground flock: **the faithful, half-taken** — believers "baptized" repeatedly, each dip leaving less mind behind; some are now pool-creatures under his control. The site runs as a mix of **working temple-farm** and **nearly-empty-and-wrong**: he is mainly running **experiments** (making the pool emit on command — [[the-pool]]).

> [!dm] Decide / design:
> - **The Shipton fall (lean, grill 2026-07-09):** he was *testing* self-sacrifice — **burned his daughter Trista** — the town revolted to burn his church, and in panic he **summoned (maybe accidentally) the wave/Pool** that drowned Shipton. He took it as divine confirmation and spiralled deeper. ("The Priest's Descent" — see [[shipton]].) Eddy's fractured memories ARE this atrocity. Not fully locked.
> - **Is Torm real & complicit, or is this heresy Torm would reject?** (Ties to [[thread-gods-shift]].)
> - Name/face; his cult's on-the-ground shape; relationship to [[spells-family|Mr. Spells]] (separate figure).
